title: Strange width mismatch error
body:
Strange width mismatch error.  LHS and RHS are both having same width. But each expects the other to be different!!! This is a deadlock

```
%Warning-WIDTH: ../../src/include/../../src/common/madaptor/sa_st_width_convert.sv:162: Operator SUB expects 32 or 7 bits on the LHS, but LHS's SEL generates 3 bits.
                                                                                      : ... In instance sa_st_width_convert_tb.dut
            ss_src_if.data[(CNTR_WIDTH'(RATIO-1)-CNTR_WIDTH'(cntr))*IN_WIDTH +: IN_WIDTH] <= data;
                                                ^
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Warning-WIDTH: ../../src/include/../../src/common/madaptor/sa_st_width_convert.sv:162: Operator SUB expects 32 or 7 bits on the RHS, but RHS's VARREF 'cntr' generates 3 bits.
                                                                                      : ... In instance sa_st_width_convert_tb.dut
            ss_src_if.data[(CNTR_WIDTH'(RATIO-1)-CNTR_WIDTH'(cntr))*IN_WIDTH +: IN_WIDTH] <= data;
                                                ^
%Error: Exiting due to 2 warning(s)
```

May we assist you in trying to fix this yourself?
yes

                                                                                      : ... In instance sa_st_width_convert_tb.dut
